mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.money AS "money", a.title AS "title", a.sname AS "sname", a.sno AS "sno", a.pingz AS "pingz", a.state AS "state", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_rechage_log( id, uid, money, title, sname, sno, pingz, state, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{money}, #{title}, #{sname}, #{sno}, #{pingz}, #{state}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_rechage_log
uid = #{u.id},
money = #{money},
title = #{title},
sname = #{sname},
sno = #{sno},
pingz = #{pingz},
state = #{state},
update_date = #{updateDate},
WHERE id = #{id}
